value.body:
Found during a follow-up static issue scan of the Cycle codebase.

Problem:
Most V1 HTTP API endpoints are declared with `AnyPayload` and generic unknown response envelopes. This weakens runtime validation and produces an OpenAPI spec that cannot accurately describe request/response contracts, even though the contracts package already has Effect schemas for use-case inputs and outputs.

Evidence:
- `packages/api/src/http/schemas.ts:16-25` defines `ResourceEnvelope.data` as `Schema.Unknown` and collection `data` as an unknown array.
- `packages/api/src/http/schemas.ts:38` defines `AnyPayload` as an arbitrary string-keyed unknown record.
- `packages/api/src/http/endpoints/v1.ts:27-30`, `61-80`, `90-100`, `108-120`, `155-174`, `198-206`, `218-240`, `248-260`, `272-306`, and `310-314` use `AnyPayload`/generic envelopes across repository, settings, inbox, issue, draft, label, user, view, template, initiative, and automation endpoints.
- `packages/api/src/http/endpoints/v1.ts:122-129` and `182-189` are examples where explicit payload schemas already exist, showing the intended direction.
- Handlers then cast payloads through `any`, e.g. `packages/api/src/http/handlers/v1/issues.ts:70-75`, `packages/api/src/http/handlers/v1/templates.ts:32-37`, and `packages/api/src/http/handlers/v1/views.ts:26-31`.

Suggested remediation:
- Reuse `@cycle/contracts` input/output schemas in endpoint declarations.
- Define typed resource/collection envelope helpers parameterized by the `data` schema.
- Replace `AnyPayload` endpoint declarations incrementally by route group.
- Remove downstream `payload as any` casts once endpoint schemas provide typed payloads.

Acceptance criteria:
- OpenAPI output exposes concrete payload and response schemas for the main V1 routes.
- Invalid payloads are rejected by the HTTP layer before reaching use-case handlers.
- At least issue/create/update, view/create/update, template/create/update, and automation evaluate routes have typed schemas and tests.

frontmatter.title: Replace V1 AnyPayload and unknown envelopes with typed endpoint schemas

value.title: Replace V1 AnyPayload and unknown envelopes with typed endpoint schemas
